narrative:
Crestline 1A (precinct in Crawford County) has 766 registered voters, with 56.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.8%, a modest Republican lean of 2.3 percentage points.
